case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL VS LOCKETT,H & ET AL DBA 455 B 14TH ST APTS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $526.10 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 AS TO DEFENDANT LOCKETT,H & ET AL DBA 455 B 14TH ST APTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-17-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
